description: A website that allows users to get and give loans. This is a financial app written in CodeIgniter. It works with the APIs of payment systems such as PerfectMoney, Payeer, OkPay, and about 5 others. After the launch, I coped with the high load on the server (up to 5 thousand requests per second), optimized requests to the database, etc.
team: 5 persons (1x PM, DevOps; 3x Frontend dev, Backend dev, DevOps; 1x HTML/CSS coder)
responsibility: Leading Frontend and Backend developer, DevOps. I also encouraged the team to work with Git and introduced best practices for clean and reusable code. I worked so that any new customer requirement was easy to implement thanks to the system's modularity.
